expectations.evidence: Step 5: Launch Agent — verified app loads at /index.php/apps/openregister; checked admin settings URL; status.php and authentication probes all PASS
Full CRUD lifecycle on registers and schemas: List/Get/Create/Update/Delete all exercised. Create returned 201, Update returned 200 with version increment, Delete returned 200.

expectations.text: Does NOT spawn parallel agents in single mode
